summary: Add an in-game Store accessible from the menu, selling neon light items purchasable with XP earned during races via collectible XP coins.
architectural_notes: Store currency is XP earned during races via collectible XP coins.
Store is accessed from the main menu via a dedicated Store button.
Purchased neon lights are permanently unlocked (persisted per player).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Neon light icon thumbnail set: red, blue, yellow, purple, orange, white, multicolor (neon-light-red.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-blue.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-yellow.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-purple.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-orange.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-white.dim_256x256.png; neon-light-multicolor.dim_256x256.png)
- XP coin sprites for values 1, 5, 10, 20 with clear numeric marking (xp-coin-1.dim_128x128.png; xp-coin-5.dim_128x128.png; xp-coin-10.dim_128x128.png; xp-coin-20.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Add a new Store page reachable at a dedicated route (e.g., "/store") and make it accessible via a clearly labeled button on the Main Menu "Menu" tab that navigates to the Store page.

Implement the Store catalog UI listing neon light items purchasable with XP, with the following items and XP costs: red=100, blue=100, yellow=100, purple=100, orange=100, multicolor=1000, and white=25. Show the user’s current XP balance on the Store page.

Add collectible XP coins to the race track gameplay such that 1 XP and 5 XP coins appear commonly on the track, while 10 XP and 20 XP coins appear in hidden places and/or become obtainable after the player performs an "amazing stunt" during a race. Collecting a coin must automatically add its XP value to the player’s total XP (used in the Store).

Define and implement an in-race "amazing stunt" detection heuristic (using only in-game telemetry available in the current race implementation) that, when triggered, enables access to higher-value coins (10/20) as described by the user.

Create a cohesive neon-racing visual theme for the Store experience (and any new XP/coin UI elements), using a distinct palette and typography that fits neon lights. Apply it consistently across new Store components and coin-related HUD elements without changing existing read-only UI component sources.

Add frontend query/mutation wiring (React Query) to load XP + owned neon lights and to purchase items, ensuring UI updates immediately after successful purchase and after XP is earned from coin pickups.

Add generated static image assets for the Store neon light thumbnails and XP coin visuals, and render them in the Store page and in-race UI as appropriate. Store images must be placed under "frontend/public/assets/generated" and referenced directly by the frontend (not served through the backend).

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a Store page accessible via a button on the menu page
Add neon light items to the Store with XP pricing (red/blue/yellow/purple/orange/multicolor=100 XP; white=25 XP; multicolor=1000 XP)
Implement permanent unlock behavior for purchased neon lights (persist per player)
Add collectible XP coins in races (1, 5 common; 10 and 20 hidden/after stunts) and use XP as store currency

Add backend support for XP as a player currency and permanent unlocks for purchased neon lights, persisted per authenticated player. Expose backend methods for: fetching current XP + owned neon lights, purchasing a neon light (deduct XP and mark owned), and crediting XP earned from races/coin pickups.

projectName: Add XP coin pickups and a neon-light Store page accessible from Main Menu
